requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Latvia should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, fleet operator, public-sector project, or SPRK/AST-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards as adopted by LVS. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional communications, spectrum, cybersecurity, and data-interface checks under project or Latvian national requirements. Latvia uses 230/400 V 50 Hz (Continental European synchronous area) and the EMC baseline must reflect this, not China's 220/380 V.
summary.zh: 在拉脱维亚，若充电点运营商、车队运营方、公共部门项目或SPRK/AST相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与LVS采用的IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据项目或拉脱维亚国家要求触发额外通信、频谱、网络安全和数据接口检查。拉脱维亚使用230/400 V 50 Hz（欧洲大陆同步区域），EMC基准必须反映这一点，而非中国的220/380 V。
summary.zht: 在拉脫維亞，若充電點運營商、車隊運營方、公共部門項目或SPRK/AST相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與LVS採用的IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量標準一致。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據項目或拉脫維亞國家要求觸發額外通訊、頻譜、網絡安全和數據接口檢查。拉脫維亞使用230/400 V 50 Hz（歐洲大陸同步區域），EMC基準必須反映這一點，而非中國的220/380 V。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
Latvia Communications Regulatory Authority (SPRK) or applicable spectrum authority requirements for radio modules where in scope

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment, SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Latvian operators, roaming, language (Latvian), currency (EUR), and data interfaces.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为拉脱维亚运营商、漫游、语言（拉脱维亚语）、货币（欧元）和数据接口重新配置。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為拉脫維亞運營商、漫遊、語言（拉脫維亞語）、貨幣（歐元）和數據接口重新配置。

standards_or_laws: China radio module approvals where applicable

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module approval path, and IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Latvia configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against the specific SPRK/AST supply point constraints. Latvia uses EUR and may require Latvian-language user interfaces and documentation for regulated deployments.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终拉脱维亚配置的OCPP版本、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块审批路径，以及IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合具体SPRK/AST供电点约束进行审查。拉脱维亚使用欧元，监管部署可能要求拉脱维亚语用户界面和文件。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終拉脫維亞配置的OCPP版本、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組審批路徑，以及IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合具體SPRK/AST供電點約束進行審查。拉脫維亞使用歐元，監管部署可能要求拉脫維亞語用戶界面和文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, fleet, or utility-linked chargers; EMC and power-quality evidence is expected where required by LVS, SPRK, AST, tender, or site-owner specifications
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Latvia networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, IEC 61000 EMC and power quality, and local communications-module requirements. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs. Latvian-language user interfaces and EUR payment integration may be required for regulated public deployments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 拉脱维亚联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量，以及当地通信模块要求。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。受监管的公共部署可能要求拉脱维亚语用户界面和欧元支付集成。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 拉脫維亞聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和電能質量，以及當地通訊模組要求。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。受監管的公共部署可能要求拉脫維亞語用戶界面和歐元支付集成。
